synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-23323 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 python3.12 security update
description:
[3.12.12-1.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference

[3.12.12-1]
- Update to 3.12.12
Resolves: RHEL-125856
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-23323

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23323.html
